mapper.select: SELECT user_id, username, password, real_name, role_id, status FROM sys_user WHERE username=#{username} AND status=1
SELECT u.*, r.role_name FROM sys_user u LEFT JOIN sys_role r ON u.role_id=r.role_id ORDER BY u.user_id DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sys_user (username, password, real_name, phone, email, role_id, status) VALUES (#{username}, #{password}, #{realName}, #{phone}, #{email}, #{roleId}, 1)
mapper.update: UPDATE sys_user SET real_name=#{realName}, phone=#{phone}, email=#{email}, role_id=#{roleId}, update_time=now() WHERE user_id=#{userId}
mapper.delete: UPDATE sys_user SET status=0, update_time=now() WHERE user_id=#{id}
mapper.update: UPDATE sys_user SET status=#{status}, update_time=now() WHERE user_id=#{id}
UPDATE sys_user SET password=#{password}, update_time=now() WHERE user_id=#{id}
